reviews.comment:
Excelente, los baños como siempre impecables me atrevo a decir los mejores baños desde Córdoba a buenos aires mi flia siempre quieren ir a esos baños por los impecables que son a toda horas mis felicitaciones

(Translated by Google)
Excellent! The restrooms are as always spotless. I dare say they're the best restrooms from Córdoba to Buenos Aires. My family always wants to go there because they're so clean at all times. Congratulations!
